name: Womb
short_description: During a route next to Prasinos, a colonized little planet, Helena received an order to investigate an S.O.S. sign streamed by the mothership Z9. When landing on site, she discovers that the situation was much worse than she thought.
detailed_description:
During a route next to Prasinos, a colonized little planet, Helena received an order to investigate an S.O.S. sign streamed by the mothership Z9. When landing on site, she discovers an accident that resulted in the escape of specimens used in studies, and she finds herself isolated in a facility surrounded by threats. Unable to retake contact with the HQ from inside the Z9, Helena will need to find a way to the nearest base so she can communicate with her fellows.

Inspired by the 16-bit era, this is a side-scrolling action-platform game that offers different challenges at each unlocked level. Run through the shadows of an enemy-infested ship, make your way through an alien flora and survive the dangers of lava filled caves in a world inhabited by creatures from another planet. Handcrafted pixel art sprites, animated frame by frame and an overworld, so you can navigate between the levels.

Remember the experience of living a story with a beginning, middle and end while jump through platforms, fighting different enemies and bosses.

Features:
• Challenges involving platforms, traps and enemies.
• Bosses with different strategies.
• Alternate between different kinds of shots according to the need of each challenge.
• Overworld connecting the levels so that you can navigate between them as you progress.
• Original soundtrack.
